name: fablever
description: Make any Claude model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) work more like Claude Fable 5 in Claude Code — a behavioral working-style layer (output style + hooks + MCP) PLUS an experimental orchestration layer (runnable Workflow recipes for independent review, divergent exploration, decompose-and-fan-out). A style/structure transplant, not a capability transplant. Zero dependencies.
author: elon-choo (https://github.com/elon-choo)

scripts.test: node test/mcp-test.js && node test/fusion-test.js && node test/orchestration-test.js && node test/orchestration-runtime-test.js && node test/model-test.mjs && node orchestration/lib/xverify-preset.mjs --selftest && node eval/ultra/score.mjs && node test/install-mjs-test.mjs && node test/run-install-test.mjs
